creator: ricardo.areis@gmail.com
text:
Hi ,

    I read the pr for ports/111773, kldfind not  suported in releng_4
and think with this pr my ports work better.
   No problem, thanks

Ricardo A. Reis


Tue, 17 Apr 2007 17:10:11 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>:
>
> Maintainer of sysutils/kldfind,
>
> Please note that PR ports/111773 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/111773
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
